glosses.ja: 落ち着いて; 静かに

sentences.target: On prend le café tranquillement sur la terrasse.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ pʁɑ̃ lə kafe tʁɑ̃.kil.mɑ̃ syʁ la tɛʁas/

translations.fr: On prend le café tranquillement sur la terrasse.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ pʁɑ̃ lə kafe tʁɑ̃.kil.mɑ̃ syʁ la tɛʁas/
translations.en: We’re quietly having coffee on the terrace.
translations.es: Estamos tomando café tranquilamente en la terraza.
translations.de: Wir trinken in Ruhe Kaffee auf der Terrasse.
translations.it: Stiamo prendendo un caffè tranquillamente in terrazza.
translations.ko: 우리는 테라스에서 조용히 커피를 마시고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在露台上安静地喝咖啡。
translations.yue: 我哋喺露台靜靜哋飲咖啡。
translations.ru: Мы спокойно пьём кофе на террасе.
translations.pt: Estamos tomando café tranquilamente na varanda.
translations.he: אנחנו שותים קפה בשקט על המרפסת.
translations.tr: Terasda sakin bir şekilde kahve içiyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang uống cà phê một cách yên tĩnh trên ban công.
translations.ar: نحن نشرب القهوة بهدوء على الشرفة.
translations.nl: We drinken rustig koffie op het terras.
translations.uk: Ми спокійно п’ємо каву на терасі.
translations.hi: हम टैरेस पर शांति से कॉफी पी रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi drikker kaffe rolig på terrassen.
translations.id: Kami sedang minum kopi dengan tenang di teras.
translations.sv: Vi dricker kaffe lugnt på terrassen.
translations.cs: V klidu pijeme kávu na terase.
translations.da: Vi drikker kaffe roligt på terrassen.
translations.ja: テラスで静かにコーヒーを飲んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/colloquial subject pronoun, often used for 'we'; controls 3rd person singular agreement.
Main lexical verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; selects the direct object 'le café'.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing the noun 'café'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'prend'.
Manner adverb modifying the verb phrase; indicates the action is done calmly/quietly.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing 'terrasse'.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'sur'.

translations.ko: 너는 오늘 밤 차를 차분하게 운전하고 있어.
translations.ru: Ты сегодня вечером ведёшь машину спокойно.
translations.tr: Bu akşam sakin bir şekilde sürüyorsun.
translations.vi: Tối nay bạn lái xe một cách bình tĩnh.
translations.hi: तुम आज रात शांतिपूर्वक गाड़ी चला रहे हो.
translations.id: Malam ini kamu menyetir dengan tenang.
translations.ja: 今夜は落ち着いて運転している。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular.
Manner adverb modifying 'conduis'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, deictic ('this/that'), modifying 'soir'.
Common noun, masculine; head of the temporal NP 'ce soir' ('this evening/tonight').

translations.de: Wir gehen in Ruhe zu Fuß nach Hause.
translations.it: Torniamo a casa a piedi con calma.
translations.ko: 우리는 차분히 걸어서 집에 돌아가고 있어요.
translations.pt: Voltamos para casa a pé tranquilamente.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang đi bộ về nhà một cách bình thản.
translations.ar: نحن نعود إلى المنزل سيرًا على الأقدام بهدوء.
translations.hi: हम शांति से पैदल घर लौट रहे हैं.
translations.el: Γυρνάμε ήρεμα σπίτι με τα πόδια.
translations.ro: Mergem liniștiți pe jos spre casă.
translations.da: Vi går roligt hjem til fods.
translations.ja: 私たちは落ち着いて歩いて家に帰っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person plural.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; means 'go/come back'.
Manner adverb modifying 'rentrons'.
Preposition; forms the fixed expression 'à pied' meaning 'on foot'.
Common noun, masculine; object of 'à' in the fixed phrase 'à pied' ('on foot').

sentences.target: J’aime lire tranquillement le dimanche matin.

translations.fr: J’aime lire tranquillement le dimanche matin.
translations.en: I like to read quietly on Sunday morning.
translations.es: Me gusta leer tranquilamente el domingo por la mañana.
translations.de: Ich lese sonntagmorgens gern in Ruhe.
translations.it: Mi piace leggere tranquillamente la domenica mattina.
translations.ko: 나는 일요일 아침에 조용히 책 읽는 걸 좋아해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我喜欢在星期天早上安静地读书。
translations.yue: 我鍾意喺星期日朝早靜靜地睇書。
translations.ru: Мне нравится спокойно читать в воскресное утро.
translations.pt: Eu gosto de ler tranquilamente no domingo de manhã.
translations.he: אני אוהב לקרוא בשקט ביום ראשון בבוקר.
translations.vi: Tôi thích đọc sách một cách yên tĩnh vào sáng Chủ nhật.
translations.ar: أحب أن أقرأ بهدوء صباح يوم الأحد.
translations.nl: Ik lees op zondagochtend graag rustig.
translations.uk: Мені подобається спокійно читати в неділю вранці.
translations.hi: मुझे रविवार की सुबह शांति से पढ़ना पसंद है.
translations.pl: Lubię spokojnie czytać w niedzielę rano.
translations.el: Μου αρέσει να διαβάζω ήρεμα το πρωί της Κυριακής.
translations.nb: Jeg liker å lese rolig søndag morgen.
translations.id: Saya suka membaca dengan tenang pada Minggu pagi.
translations.sv: Jag gillar att läsa lugnt på söndagsmorgonen.
translations.ro: Îmi place să citesc liniștit duminica dimineața.
translations.cs: Rád čtu v klidu v neděli ráno.
translations.da: Jeg kan godt lide at læse roligt søndag morgen.
translations.ja: 日曜の朝に静かに読書するのが好きです。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject 'je' elided to 'j'' attached to the finite verb 'aime' (present indicative, 1st person singular).
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of 'J’aime'.
Manner adverb modifying 'lire'.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing the temporal noun 'dimanche'.
Common noun denoting a day of the week; here in a temporal NP ('le dimanche matin').
Common noun, masculine; head of the temporal phrase 'le dimanche matin'.
